title: GraphSpec
description: Complete graph definition – the executable blueprint for a workflow run. Contains all nodes, edges, and entry/end pointers. This is the core data structure shared between the Java control plane and Python execution plane.

nodes.description: List of all nodes in the graph. Each node id must be unique within this list.

edges.description: List of all directed edges in the graph. Each edge id must be unique within this list. Source/target must reference valid node ids or the 'END' sentinel.

entry_node.description: id of the entry node where execution begins. Must reference a valid NodeSpec.id in the nodes array.

end_node.description: id of the terminal node or sentinel value marking workflow completion. Defaults to 'END'.
